theory.canonical_statement: ID 404 establishes the gradient of the metric perturbation induced by the localized vacuum pressure residue at the singularity. While standard General Relativity treats the cosmological constant Lambda as a global scalar, the Trawinistic framework reifies it as a position dependent effective term, Lambdaeff (r), which achieves peak divergence at the TZP. The gradient nabladeltagnu is the primary driver for the localized gravitational displacement perceived by a comoving observer. By modulating the Jp [ID 403], the system can "tilt" this gradient, effectively creating a directed volumetric displacement force. This is the engineering basis for inertial nullification. Poynting Flux Damping: This gradient incorporates the damping terms derived from the electromagnetic stress energy tensor [ID 401], ensuring the manifold does not undergo a catastrophic Schwarzschild collapse during energy extraction.
